channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Is the US at war with Iran, and will it put boots on the ground?
item.description: Some of the main questions asked about the military developments in the Middle East, and what we know so far.

item.title: Nepal election: Is the monarchy still a force, two decades after ouster?
item.description: Ex-King Gyanendra Shah was removed from power 20 years ago. Will a Nepal in political flux give him another chance?

item.title: Protests in Venezuela against US-Israeli war on Iran
item.description: Protesters in Venezuela have rallied outside the Iranian Embassy to condemn the US-Israeli war on Iran.

item.title: Oil on Fire: War impacts global energy markets
item.description: Attacks on energy facilities, along with Iran blockading the Strait of Hormuz, are raising global oil and gas prices.

item.title: UK to end study visas for Myanmar, Afghanistan, Cameroon, Sudan students
item.description: The ban on students from the four countries comes amid a rise in anti-immigration sentiment in the UK.

item.title: Rubio claim of Israeli role in US Iran attack reverberates, despite denial
item.description: Commentators across political spectrum, including MAGA base, seize on Rubio's words amid shifting war justifications.

item.title: Macron warns Israel against Lebanon invasion
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron has warned Israel against invading Lebanon.

item.title: Iran live news: US embassy in Dubai hit; Israel pounds Tehran, Beirut
item.description: US and Israel continue to pound Iran and Lebanon, as Tehran's counterstrikes disrupt oil flows in the Middle East.

item.title: Unpacking US justification for Iran attacks
item.description: US officials confirmed the US didn’t attack Iran because of an ‘imminent threat’ but because Israel was going to strike.

item.title: Atletico Madrid reach Copa del Rey final despite 3-0 loss at Barcelona
item.description: ‌Diego Simeone's side reach ⁠Copa ⁠del Rey final for the first time since 2013, with 4-3 aggregate semifinal victory.

item.title: Qatar announces arrest of Iran’s IRGC sleeper cells
item.description: Tehran has launched multiple attacks on Qatar and other Gulf states since US-Israeli strikes on Iran began on Saturday.

item.title: Spain baulks at Trump’s threat to cut off all trade over NATO, Iran stance
item.description: The US has relocated 15 aircraft, including refuelling tankers, from military bases in southern Spain.

item.title: Travellers stranded, airlines under pressure as Iran war escalates
item.description: Thousands are stranded as major Gulf hubs, including Dubai, remain closed or severely restricted for a fourth day.

item.title: Rubio says Iran was ‘playing’ US in negotiations
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio defended joint US-Israeli strikes on Iran, saying “the world will be safer”.

item.title: Oman renews push for diplomacy, says ‘off-ramps available’ in Iran war
item.description: Oman had been mediating talks between Iran and the US before Washington attacked Tehran.

item.title: What are the implications of Iran’s strikes on Gulf Arab states?
item.description: Iran is launching attacks across the Gulf region after the US-Israel operation against the country.

item.title: ‘Worst-case scenario’: Trump weighs replacing Khamenei as leader of Iran
item.description: Trump appeared to dismiss Reza Pahlavi as an option and sketched a vision of Iran's government similar to Venezuela's.

item.title: Trump mulls exiled Iranian dissident Reza Pahlavi as regime successor
item.description: US President Donald Trump said Iranian dissident Reza Pahlavi could be a possible successor to Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

item.title: US midterm primary season kicks off in shadow of Iran war
item.description: Primaries will determine party candidates in November race to control Congress, give early window into voter sentiment.

item.title: US will provide insurance for ships in Gulf amid Iranian attacks: Trump
item.description: US Navy 'will begin escorting' oil tankers through the Strait of Hormuz, a strategic waterway, if necessary, Trump says.

item.title: UK, France send warships, air defence assets to Cyprus after drone attack
item.description: The development comes after an Iranian-made drone crashed into the UK's military base in Cyprus.

item.title: Flames, smoke rise from US Consulate in Dubai after suspected attack
item.description: Flames and black smoke were seen rising from the US Consulate in Dubai after a suspected attack.

item.title: Iran mourns 165 girls, staff killed in US-Israel strike on Minab school
item.description: Thousands gathered in Minab, Iran, for a mass funeral of 165 schoolgirls and staff killed in a US-Israeli airstrike.

item.title: Ukraine offers defence swap help to Gulf states
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has offered Gulf states a ‘swap’ deal to enhance defence capabilities.

item.title: UK allows US to use British bases for ‘defensive strikes’ on Iran
item.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer has allowed the US to use British bases for so-called “defensive strikes” targeting Iran.
